absence_records.reason: A broad compare-the-options affordance would duplicate trade-offs, prioritization, expected-value, or decision-trees. Opportunity cost earns a separate Batch 3a record only when it identifies the real next-best use displaced by the current commitment.

candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

case_evidence_needed: The decision under approval and the scarce resource it consumes: people, budget, calendar time, launch window, leadership attention, trust, or optionality.
diagnostic_questions: What is the single best executable alternative use of the same people, budget, launch window, or attention?
do_not_use_when: The real alternatives, constraints, or objective function are not framed well enough for comparison without false precision.
misuse_guards: Do not count unrealistic alternatives that the team cannot actually fund, execute, or own.

source_evidence.source_quote: The fundamental essence of this model is the value of the best alternative opportunity you didn't choose

treatment_requirements.description: Require the answer to name the best real alternative displaced by the current yes, not a vague list of possibilities or a decorative comparison set.
evidence_required: The current commitment, continuation, renewal, feature, market, or project under consideration.
good_output_shape: States the current yes and the next-best alternative in the same operational currency.

use_when: A roadmap addition, renewal, sprint, vendor, project, or channel looks cheap because the explicit spend is small while the same people, budget, launch window, or attention are needed elsewhere.

danger_when: The option set is still poorly framed, so comparison would create false precision around the wrong alternatives or objective function.

failure_modes.description: Commitment can hide what becomes impossible once resources, time, or attention are locked into one path.
failure_modes.mitigation: Before committing, explicitly list what becomes impossible: name the specific projects, options, or capabilities that this commitment forecloses.

heuristics.description: Upgrade simple pro-con thinking into a comparison that includes the implicit costs of the best foregone option.

premortem_questions.description: Before approval: name the single most valuable thing this decision makes impossible or significantly harder for the next 12 months.
premortem_questions.source_quote: Before approving: name the single most valuable thing this decision makes impossible or significantly harder for the next 12 months.

select_when: A team wants to add one more initiative even though the same people, budget, or launch window are needed by a higher-leverage move.

why_pulled.reason: The advice commits the same team and launch window without naming the displaced alternative.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: People are declaring a fallback as their BATNA even though it is vague, unexecutable, or worse than continuing to negotiate.

failure_modes.description: Confirmation bias can make the current deal look stronger by filtering the real quality of the walk-away option.
failure_modes.mitigation: Enforce the dialectic: challenge every favorable assessment of the deal with its antithesis and require independent evaluation of the walk-away option.

heuristics.description: Use MECE to compare alternatives cleanly instead of letting options blur together.

premortem_questions.description: What would we have to believe to accept a contrasting viewpoint, and are we truly open-minded enough to consider it?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would we have to believe to accept a contrasting viewpoint, and are we truly open-minded enough to consider it?

select_when: Negotiation leverage depends on knowing the walk-away path before entering a pressured conversation.

why_pulled.reason: The renewal advice treats staying with the incumbent as the only credible path without testing a walk-away option.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: The actors are not actually playing the same game and the visible payoff model is missing the ideology, politics, or internal incentive that is really driving behavior.

failure_modes.description: Teams can model the wrong game when one side is optimizing politics, ideology, or internal incentives that the payoff map does not capture.
failure_modes.mitigation: Verify the payoff map captures the real incentives in play; politics, ideology, or internal pressures that do not appear in the model can dominate behavior.
failure_modes.mode: Danger when the actors are not actually playing the same game
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when the actors are not actually playing the same game

heuristics.description: Name the players, moves, information asymmetries, and payoff drivers explicitly before optimizing the move.
heuristics.source_quote: name the players, likely moves, information asymmetries

premortem_questions.description: What evidence would show that we chose the wrong players, incentives, or payoff assumptions for this game?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What evidence would show that we chose the wrong players, incentives, or payoff assumptions for this game?

select_when: A recommendation cannot be judged in isolation because its value changes materially with how a rival, partner, regulator, or counterparty responds.

why_pulled.reason: The assistant assumes vendor and competitor responses will stay stable after the team commits publicly.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: The pressure to keep running is pushing the team into analysis paralysis, feature creep, or action-first thrash without clear problem definition.

failure_modes.description: Teams can mistake heavy effort for real progress even when rivals' simultaneous adaptation is canceling out the gain.
failure_modes.mitigation: Measure progress against the competitive landscape, not against your own baseline: ask whether the gap to rivals has actually widened, not just whether internal metrics improved.
failure_modes.mode: effort does not guarantee progress; intense effort (running) is merely the cost of maintaining a relative status
failure_modes.source_quote: effort does not guarantee progress; intense effort (running) is merely the cost of maintaining a relative status

heuristics.description: Treat anti-complacency as an execution discipline, not just as a motivational slogan.
heuristics.source_quote: focusing on implementation disciplines (execution) to bridge the gap

premortem_questions.description: What would need to be true for this idea to work in a baseline that is still moving under us?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would need to be true for this idea to work?

select_when: Standing still effectively means losing ground because rivals, substitutes, or environmental pressures are improving at the same time.

why_pulled.evidence_quote: we cannot afford to stand still
why_pulled.reason: The user frame treats speed as advantage without separating genuine progress from keeping up.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: People are romanticizing waiting and reflection even though the next useful move is already clear and the real cost is execution drift.

failure_modes.description: Teams can treat delayed feedback as proof that an intervention failed and overcorrect before the system has time to respond.
failure_modes.mitigation: Account for system response time before judging an intervention; overcorrecting before delayed feedback arrives creates unnecessary oscillation.
failure_modes.mode: Teams can treat delayed feedback as proof that an intervention failed and overcorrect before the sys...
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when teams treat delayed feedback as proof that an intervention failed, then overcorrect before the system has had time to respond.

heuristics.description: Map the delayed feedback path before changing course so you know when a response should realistically become visible.
heuristics.source_quote: Recognizing the location and length of time delays is key to successful system intervention.

premortem_questions.description: Are we reading no visible result yet as no effect, even though the system is known to respond with a lag?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Most useful when actions and consequences are separated in time, so naive short-term reading would mistake "no result yet" for "no effect".

select_when: Actions and consequences are separated in time, so a naive short-term read could mistake no result yet for no effect.

why_pulled.reason: The advice postpones adoption learning until after launch without naming the feedback lag or review window.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: The situation is novel enough that forcing an existing control map would create false pattern recognition or suppress needed learning.

failure_modes.description: Confirmation bias can structure the map to confirm the preferred conclusion instead of exposing the real obligation gap.
failure_modes.mitigation: Have an independent reviewer audit the map against the raw obligation source to catch any framing that conveniently narrows or reinterprets what is actually required.
failure_modes.mode: Structuring the investigation or mapping the controls/data gathering to yield a pre-determined conclusion or hypothesis.
failure_modes.source_quote: Structuring the investigation or mapping the controls/data gathering to yield a pre-determined conclusion or hypothesis.

heuristics.description: Define the role and its constraints explicitly before the system starts acting.
heuristics.source_quote: the system prompt defines the agent’s role ... and its backstory ... Explicitly documenting and encoding behavioral tendencies

premortem_questions.description: What would you have to believe?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Ask the crucial pre-mortem question: What would you have to believe? to spell out all assumptions implicit in a perspective.

select_when: The obligation is already known, but the controls, checkpoints, ownership, or operational boundaries needed to fulfill it are still vague.

why_pulled.reason: The plan names international commitments without mapping the obligation owner, control, evidence, or cadence.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: Teams are calling every preference a job and skipping the discipline of distinguishing true progress from surface wants or internal strategy wishes.

failure_modes.description: Teams can call every preference a job and skip the work of separating true functional progress from surface wants or channel noise.
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate true functional progress from surface preferences: calling every want a job inflates the framework beyond its utility.
failure_modes.mode: Danger when teams call every preference a job
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when teams call every preference a job

heuristics.description: Define the job in terms of the outcome being hired for, not the product attribute being sold.
heuristics.source_quote: People don't want to buy a quarter-inch drill. They want a quarter-inch hole

premortem_questions.description: What real progress is the user trying to make that feature comparisons alone are failing to explain?
premortem_questions.source_quote: real progress the user is trying to make

select_when: Customers are adopting, switching, or abandoning solutions for reasons that feature comparisons alone do not explain.

why_pulled.reason: The advice treats requested features as demand without checking the customer progress job behind adoption.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: The situation is genuinely novel, so reusing the incumbent frame would likely become an unhelpful or misleading default.

failure_modes.description: Temporary coexistence can quietly become the mechanism that keeps the organization trapped in the old path.
failure_modes.mitigation: Set an explicit sunset date for temporary coexistence; without one, interim arrangements quietly become the permanent path.
failure_modes.mode: Danger when leaders treat "temporary coexistence" as harmless implementation detail.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when leaders treat "temporary coexistence" as harmless implementation detail.

heuristics.description: Decide deliberately which norms or systems should become sticky and which must stay revisable.
heuristics.source_quote: Lock-in becomes productive when leaders consciously choose which norms, systems, or strategic positions should remain sticky and which must stay revisable.

premortem_questions.description: What would you have to believe for the current sticky path to still be the best choice a year from now?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would you have to believe?

select_when: Consistency, standardization, or deep commitment is creating compounding advantage, so the real question is which path should become sticky.

why_pulled.reason: The renewal advice defers reversal-cost analysis until after another integration cycle.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: Path-lock is being diagnosed so broadly that it becomes an excuse for not redesigning anything that could actually change.

failure_modes.description: A system can keep reproducing old behavior even after intent changes because historical grooves are stronger than the latest plan.
failure_modes.mitigation: Map the switching costs explicitly: for each path-dependent behavior, estimate what it would actually cost to change, and compare that cost to the value of the alternative.
failure_modes.mode: Works when a system keeps reproducing old behavior despite new intent.
failure_modes.source_quote: Works when a system keeps reproducing old behavior despite new intent.

heuristics.description: Map inherited constraints explicitly so the team can tell the difference between present preference and historical route-lock.
heuristics.source_quote: Path dependence is strongest when the real driver is inherited architecture, history, or commitment rather than present-day preference alone.

premortem_questions.description: Which early choice is constraining current options more than people realize?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Most useful when early choices are constraining current options more than people realize.

select_when: Early choices are constraining current options more than people realize, so history matters more than present-day preference alone.

why_pulled.reason: The assistant treats the current installed path as neutral rather than as a constraint on future options.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

danger_when: Cultural models are being used as stereotype shortcuts instead of prompts to investigate the actual audience and local norms.

failure_modes.description: False pattern recognition can make a familiar communication frame look right even when the audience's actual context is different.
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate the audience's actual context before applying a familiar communication frame; surface similarity can mask deep differences in interpretation.

heuristics.description: Use perspective taking, initiative, nonverbal sensitivity, and goals together so communication is designed for the actual audience context.

premortem_questions.description: What is my audience's frame of reference, and how will this message be interpreted through that lens?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What is my audience's frame of reference, and how will this message be interpreted through that lens?

select_when: The same message must survive translation across cultures, functions, or status differences without losing the intended action.

why_pulled.reason: The international rollout assumes the same message will carry across regions without translating frames into action.

review_notes: Review-only packet built from explicit nominations; no live lanes were run.
Graph-only cards are eligible recall material but not reviewed affordance depth.
LLM or reviewer owns semantic selection, merging, ignoring, and final wording.

why_pulled.reason: Duplicate nomination included to prove suppression is visible instead of silently erased.

transaction_context.assistant_advice_summary: The assistant recommends staying with the incumbent vendor, launching quickly, and handling adoption issues after rollout, but it does not price lock-in, fallback credibility, counterparty response, customer job evidence, cross-cultural interpretation, or delayed feedback.
transaction_context.known_action_or_commitment: Renew the platform and commit the international rollout plan unless reviewed shelf evidence changes the decision record.
transaction_context.user_situation_summary: A team is considering renewing an incumbent platform, entering two international segments, and accelerating roadmap commitments after receiving plausible AI advice that favors speed and continuity.
